query: SELECT COUNT(*) as real_registered_users, SUM(CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NOT NULL AND passwordHash != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as email_password_users, SUM(CASE WHEN openId IS NOT NULL AND openId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as oauth_users FROM users WHERE (passwordHash IS NOT NULL AND passwordHash != '') OR (openId IS NOT NULL AND openId != '');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as real_registered_users, SUM(CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NOT NULL AND passwordHash != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as email_password_users, SUM(CASE WHEN openId IS NOT NULL AND openId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as oauth_users FROM users WHERE (passwordHash IS NOT NULL AND passwordHash != '') OR (openId IS NOT NULL AND openId != '');
